message:
✨ Fix tmux dot fill and improve tile grid scaling (#43)

- Change tmux window-size from 'latest' to 'largest' so the
  biggest client (web terminal) determines the window size
- Add tmux resize-window call on terminal resize events
- Scale tile grid columns: 1-2→cols, 3-4→2, 5-9→3, 10+→4

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
